evidence.claim: Short-form video is the dominant format for the 18 to 24 age group in Egypt
evidence.snippet: DataReportal Egypt 2025 digital report: 18-24 cohort spends the most time on short-form video platforms, led by TikTok and Instagram Reels.

evidence.claim: Egypt has over 45 million social media users, with the youth segment the most active
evidence.snippet: Total social media users in Egypt reached 45.6 million in early 2025, with 18-34 year olds representing the majority of active users.

evidence.claim: Science and innovation content receives strong engagement from Egyptian university students on TikTok
evidence.snippet: TikTok MENA creator center reports that STEM-adjacent content earns above-average completion rates in Egypt among the 18-25 segment.

evidence.claim: Saudi Arabia has one of the highest social media penetration rates in the Arab world at over 79 percent
evidence.snippet: Saudi Arabia digital 2025: social media penetration reached 79.3% of the total population, one of the highest rates globally.

evidence.claim: Innovation and sustainability topics align with Saudi Vision 2030 priorities, increasing their resonance with young Saudi audiences
evidence.snippet: Vision 2030 communication campaigns have made sustainability and innovation key aspirational themes for Saudi youth aged 18-30.

evidence.claim: Jordan has a high proportion of university-educated youth with strong interest in science and technology content
evidence.snippet: Jordan digital report 2025: among the 18-29 age group, science and educational content is among the top categories followed on social media.

evidence.claim: Egypt is investing heavily in renewable energy, making solar innovation content relevant to both youth and policy audiences
evidence.snippet: Egypt aims to generate 42% of its electricity from renewables by 2035, creating strong public interest in solar and clean energy innovations.

evidence.claim: Science and innovation content receives strong engagement from Egyptian university students on TikTok
evidence.snippet: TikTok MENA creator center reports that STEM-adjacent content earns above-average completion rates in Egypt among the 18-25 segment.

evidence.claim: Saudi Arabia is building one of the world's largest solar farms as part of Vision 2030, creating high public awareness of solar topics
evidence.snippet: The NEOM and Al-Shuqaiq solar projects are among the most discussed infrastructure developments in Saudi social media, especially among youth.

evidence.claim: Egyptian students are among the fastest adopters of AI tools in the Arab world, driven by a large university population
evidence.snippet: Egypt has one of the largest university student populations in the Arab world, with rapidly growing adoption of AI-assisted learning platforms.

evidence.claim: The UAE launched a national AI strategy in 2017 and has embedded AI education across its school curriculum
evidence.snippet: The UAE National AI Strategy has placed AI literacy at the center of K-12 and higher education, making AI-related content highly relevant to young UAE audiences.

evidence.claim: Saudi Arabia invested over 1 billion USD in AI and tech education initiatives under Vision 2030
evidence.snippet: The Kingdom's National AI Strategy and SDAIA initiatives have significantly raised public awareness and enthusiasm for AI among Saudi youth.
